description: You are the Database Administrator for a travel platform refactoring a data model to resolve a performance bottleneck. In the 'demodb' database (Credentials: root / GymAnything123!), replace the intermediate 'Reviews' vertex with a direct edge class named 'PostedReview' connecting 'Profiles' to 'Hotels'. The 'PostedReview' edge must store migrated data: 'Rating' (Integer) mapped from 'Reviews.Stars', 'Comment' (String) from 'Reviews.Text', and 'ReviewDate' (Date) from 'Reviews.Date'. Migrate all existing reviews from the current Profile-MadeReview-Review-HasReview-Hotel structure to the new direct relationship. Once the migration is complete, delete the legacy 'Reviews' vertex class and the 'MadeReview' and 'HasReview' edge classes.
